description: Style NoteWhen it comes to everyday accessories, we recommend this wallet from lino perros which is the ultimate blend of durability and style. A coloured binding along the edge of the wallet gives it a quirky edge while its multiple pouches and slots help you keep yourself organised.Product DetailsChocolate brown wallet with tan binding around the circumferenceTextured surfaceTwo main compartmentsThree card slots on left with slip pocketFlap with three card slots and a mesh id card holderThree card slots on right with slip pocket and embossed brandingBrand logo embossed on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize12 cm x 9 cm
